title: Project Manager
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a Project Manager to lead end‑to‑end projects for high‑precision automation and assembly machines in the pharma and medtech industries. You will coordinate engineering teams, manage project timelines and budgets. To ensure successful machine commissioning and customer acceptance.

Main Responsibilities

  • You will manage the full lifecycle of assigned projects for high‑precision automation and assembly machines used in the pharmaceutical and medtech industries, from project initiation to on‑site commissioning at the customer’s facility.
  • You will supervise and coordinate engineering teams to ensure full alignment with the project’s budget, schedule, and quality requirements.
  • You will analyze and plan the necessary resources based on ongoing and upcoming projects.
  • You will ensure that commissioning and customer acceptance testing of our assembly systems meet all technical and performance expectations.
  • You will act as the primary contact for customers throughout the project, providing clear and regular updates on progress.
  • You will contribute your strong technical expertise to support engineering teams and help identify robust solutions throughout the design and integration phases.
  • You will monitor project execution to ensure full compliance with budget, timelines, and quality standards.
  • You will work closely with the technical office/engineering teams to guarantee machine reliability, performance, and long‑term viability after commissioning.

Requirements

  • Degree in Mechanical, Automation, Electrical Engineering, or related field.
  • Experience in industrial automation, machinery, or high‑precision equipment.
  • Strong technical knowledge across mechanical, automation, and electrical domains.
  • Excellent communication and customer‑facing skills.
  • Proficient with IT tools and ERP systems.
  • Organized, proactive, and a strong team player.

What We Offer

  • A dynamic and diversified role with growth opportunities.
  • The chance to work on challenging automation and assembly projects for the pharma and medtech sectors.
  • A collaborative and supportive team environment.
  • A people‑centric, transparent, and innovative company culture.
  • Attractive remuneration package

Singaporean /PRs only. Immediate availability.

postedCompany.description:
MIKRON SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

We are one of the world's leading manufacturers of customized, high performance, high output assembly automation and test solutions for products that you can hold in your hand. Mikron Automation has built its reputation on cutting-edge, standardized, selfdeveloped products, which stand out - thanks to their modularity, high degree of flexibility and precision. This guarantees fast and efficient project completion, and enables customers to quickly modify their production in line with market changes at any time, while also facilitating step-by-step investment and ensuring a prompt return on that investment. Several thousand systems have already been installed around the globe, enabling multi-shift, high-output, precision production seven days a week and thus contributing to the success of our customers. Would you like to count yourself among these ranks of extraordinary people?

 
Mission Statement
Form global partnerships with our customers by providing high quality products and services through technological innovation.
 
Our Business/Services
Performing as an extension of our customers’ manufacturing and engineering resources, we facilitate projects from inception to production. Our customers can rely on us to deliver the design and manufacture of suitable automated production systems through our positional advantage in vision inspection, automated assembly, laser systems, test automation, precision engineering and software engineering.
 
Quality statement
To provide value for our customers by offering products and services of the highest quality with on time deliveries. This is adhered through the constant pursue for leading edge technology in precise assembly automation and competent engineering adepts.
 
Strategic Alliances
Capabilities extend through partnerships with a network of reliable companies leveraging on technological and product excellence. Leading brands and strategic partnerships uniquely qualify Mikron Singapore to deliver industry solutions around the world. We emphasize on long-term partnership approach that encourages success through mutual benefit.
